last_result: Cycle 48 complete. KERNEL DEPENDENCY ANALYSIS (KDA): 5 structural findings about K1-K7 internal structure. K7 is a corollary (derivable from K1+K4+K5+K6), not an axiom — AI safety measurement mismatch is a theorem, not a contingent fact. K5 (ICTSC) is the bridge proposition connecting quality-theory thread (K1-K3) and channel-assessment thread (K4); removing K5 disconnects the framework's two modules. Refined load-bearing heart: K1+K3+K4+K5+K6 (5 propositions), correcting C47's K3+K4+K6 (which missed K1's foundational role and K5's bridge function). K2 has split role: redundant with K3 for CA qualities, independent for OA/QC. No circular dependencies. SI #38 confirmed: Kernel Dependency Analysis (KDA) — formal axiom basis {K1, K3-reflexivity-degree, K4, K6-game-theoretic-setup}. Confidence 0.82 (D4). D4 streak: 41.
